metadata.description: Workload short name used in resource naming.
SSH public key for Linux VMs (string). In production source from Key Vault.
VMSS SKU for web and app tiers.
Suffix used for globally-unique resource names (Storage, Key Vault).
Globally-unique suffix for storage account name.
Globally-unique suffix for Key Vault name.
Subnet ID for the Application Gateway.
Subnet ID for the app tier (internal LB frontend).
Subnet ID for the db tier (internal LB frontend).
VNet ID for private DNS link.
Key Vault ID for the private endpoint target.
Subnet ID where the Key Vault private endpoint is placed.
